opinion.h1: ROSENBLATT v. AMERICAN CYANAMID CO., 382 U.S. 110 (1965)
opinion.h4: ROSENBLATT v. AMERICAN CYANAMID CO. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 501. Decided November 15, 1965.
opinion.p: E. Barrett Prettyman, Jr., and Thomas J. O'Toole for appellant.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
MR. JUSTICE HARLAN took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
